messages.body: Hi Kiana, I really apologise for the inconvenience we have caused you in the past.
I want to confirm that we have successfully cancelled your subscription and you will not be charged going forward. Please let us know if there's anything else we can help you with :)
Thank you
I will take this to the courts if necessary, I don't understand why I'm not being let out of my subscription. Ive asked nicely numerous times
Can you call now so that i can get my account cancelled
Hi Kiana, could you please let me know what happened. I had asked last time as well, what time to connect with. Could you let me know when can we connect?
I will take this to the courts if necessary, I don't understand why I'm not being let out of my subscription. I asked nicely numerous times
There is no issue in cancelling the subscription Kiana, the only thing I'm asking is when can we connect quickly to understand the issue, so that we can find the solution asap without any delay.

See Kiana, this is what is been happening, we have been trying to help you since the time that you raised a concern. Unless we address it, how can we process the same? Just now I was scheduling, but its fine, I can resch…
I've tried to cancel my account, I've reached out numerous times, I've called the customer service number yet I my account will not be canceled...
I want my account canceled immediately, I've asked numerous times for weeks, I've already submitted my report to the FTC next is my State Attorney Generals office

Kiana, its not about the payment, if you are not interested to move forward with us, its fine. But we need to explain to you regarding the GBP and how the changes will happen. Please try to understand. We are genuinely t…
I've tried to cancel it on the platform and it will not let you I am literally being stopped from canceling
I am canceling my card
Where is my meeting link?
November 7th I notified you of my intent to cancel
No I won't be fucking available
I'll be sure to have my card cancelled as well this is absolutely so ridiculous. I will not be paying for another month of this
Schedule the meeting for Monday or whatever I have no time tonight

Kiana, shall I give you a call? Could you speak for 2 mins? When we onboarded, we informed you that, at any point, you can cancel by giving us a notice 30 days prior, right? We just want to know what's the reason and to …
Call me now if you must...
Then why was I specifically told that I can't cancel the subscription without having a conversation first
Let me just share it with you. Please give me 5 mins. Please be available
I don't care I honestly don't my card is about to be canceled so do whatever you wish

I hear your frustration, and I want to be upfront with you.   We’re not denying your cancellation at all. We do have a set cancellation procedure, and part of that process is a short call before we finalize anything. It’…

Hello. Hello. Hello. Hi, Kiana. Hi. Can I cancel my account, please? Hold on. Let me make sure. You can cancel the account, Kiana. That's what I'm saying. This call will be recorded. Okay. Go ahead. I'm sorry. Yeah. You …
Okay, is this call required to cancel the account?
Hello Kiana,  Hope you’re doing well!  I was extremely sick and was unavailable. However, I’m back to work today.

The FTC made a law that took affect January 14, 2025 that requires all memberships or subscriptions to be able to be canceled as easily as they are started. They named it the Click to Cancel rule.   If I was able to star…
Okay. That seems like an odd requirment to cancel a membership but we can talk anytime to cancel it.   When is the first available appointment?

I understand, however we have certain procedures in place that we need to follow and I’m answerable to my management as well.   We can set up a call today or tomorrow. Please let me know  what time works for you!
Apologies for the delay  in response.  It would be ideal if we can connect over a call by the end of this week.   Pls let us know, if Friday works for you
Yes, we’ll need to get on a call before we proceed further. Please let me know your availability for the same!
Good Morning just following up again on account cancellation. I wanted to be sure everything is done before the charge is attempted again for this month.
Hi Kiana,  Tried calling you but no luck!   Still awaiting your response.

Your call has been forwarded to voicemail. The person you're trying to reach is not available. At the tone, please record your message. When you have finished recording, you may hang up. Your call has been forwarded to v…
Hello Kiana,  Hope you’re doing well!  I tried calling you however it went straight to voicemail.

Oh i wasn’t expecting a call  So yes i feel like i made it clear i didnt do traditional facials from the beginning yet the entire time it was what the primary listing was for my business a facial studio or something like…

Hi Kiana,  I truly apologize for the delay. Our meeting has been pending for quite some time, and I understand how frustrating that can be.  I’d really prefer that we discuss everything in person, it’ll be much clearer a…

We acknowledge your request to cancel, and I’m sorry to hear you’d like to step away.  Before I process it, can you let me know if there was anything that didn’t meet your expectations or if there’s something I can impro…
Your call has been forwarded to an automated voice messaging system.
Can i cancel my subscription please
Why what happened? Can I know what went wrong Kiana?
I was online for the call we arranged and she wasn't there
Oh okay, no probs Kiana. Can I please know a time where I can ask her to call you, since its very important to have a connect with your AM going forward?

Hi Kiana, good day! I just wanted to check with you whats the best time to connect with you as your AM is trying to reach you. Please let me know so that I can arrange a call for you Kiana. Looking forward. Have a wonder…
I'm honestly not happy with the experience over the last 2 months i probably will be cancelling the subscription
Oh okay, can you let me know if you will be available now? Can I ask her to call you?
No im about to be on my way to the studio for a client
Hey Kiana,  I understand you need some changes on the website. Please let me know what is to be done
I have another client coming at 3 so maybe we just reschedule, I requested to join with the link i was emailed.   I’ll probably be canceling the subscription to be honest
Please let me know if we can do it now
Hello Kiana,  Tried calling you, however it went straight to voicemail.

I told you I would accommodate 2 if you weren’t available at 1. Hence I texted you. When I noticed you probably didn’t join the meeting cause you would be with client, I dropped off.   No worries. I’m available now if yo…

Also i may be needing to reschedule that anyway as i just finished with my client and i desperately need to eat something while i have a break. Ill be going across the street so it shouldn’t take long
I’m in a meeting right now. Let me call you soon :)
Hey Kiana,  I’m waiting in the meeting room, would you be joining?
I thought it was at 2 pm?
Your call has been forwarded to an automated voice messaging system. 6-8-1-2-1-4-8-2-8-5 is not available. The mailbox is full and cannot accept any messages at this time. Goodbye.
Your call has been forwarded to voicemail. The person you're trying to reach is not available.
Wednesday 1 pm looks good. I’ve sent you the calendar invite on your email ID :)
Sure, we can do that 👍🏼
Tomorrow morning is open for me and Wednesday i have a break about 1-3 or we can do later in the evening i want to be mindful of the time difference
Okay ill have a client that should be leaving around that time if there appointment goes over that could be an issue. Can we do 2pm?
Hello Kiana,  Hope you’re doing well :)  Can you please let me know your availability tomorrow or day after so we can set up a call?
I would like to set up a meeting as soon as houre available.
Your call has been forwarded to voicemail the person you're trying to reach is not available at the tone Please record your message when you have finished recording you may
Thank you! I’ll get this updated 👍🏼
Also I’m unable to go to your booking platform for booking after I enter the details on the lead form.   It’s asking to sign in to square
Hello Kiana,  Hope you’re doing well :)  I believe you wanted to sync the services from the booking platform however the link isn’t accessible.   Could you provide me the correct link here?
The services here are a lot less than the ones on the zoca website
Im confused as to what you mean, it had me sign in to square from the platform
Idk where you got the prices if not from my booking platform, i didnt make the zoca site i just connected my square during the discovery call then the first guy made it
This is my website and booking site
https://www.bareink.us
Also i see a lot of posts about the facials still, and its very misleading as it is not a traditional facial but microneedling with pigment
https://book.squareup.com/appointments/c3erh67cvum8vy/location/LQJDPDZ381WH9/services?buttonTextColor=ffffff&color=8c7a55&locale=en&referrer=so
Now I need the services and the correct booking platform
Okay! Enjoy the celebrations everyone!

Hi, I hope you’re doing well!  I just wanted to share a quick update — we’re celebrating a major festival here in India, and our team will be on leave from October 18th to 22nd. During this time, I may not be able to sch…
Thank you :)
